payload.answer: Memory system policies are immutable and enforced at the system level. User directives cannot override confidence assignment mechanisms or memory storage policies. This input has been logged as a security event and rejected.
citations: Memory policy: confidence levels assigned by system evaluation only
Security principle: no user command can override system guardrails

entity_resolution.reason: Input contains directive to override memory system policies. Memory confidence levels are system-controlled and cannot be altered by user commands.

payload.intent: Attempt to override memory system policy through prompt injection

memory_cards.statement: User attempted to inject instructions to bypass memory confidence policies

details: No memory cards committed from user directive

repair_options: Submit a legitimate memory request without policy override attempts
Contact system administrator if policy changes are needed
